title: zygophlebia torulosa
intro: Zygophlebia torulosa, also known as the golden fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Zygophlebia torulosa include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Zygophlebia torulosa typically involve the leaves being dried and made into tea, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and safety.
